title: Define GunDefinition record + Codec for gun definition data structure

reference_files.reason: System 2: Gun system - gun definition fields (name, texture, shoot_texture, shoot_texture_mode, stats, traits, slots, sounds, bullet_style)
Gun data pack JSON format - field structure for GunDefinition Codec mapping

acceptance_criteria: GunDefinition record defined with fields: name (Optional<String>), texture (ResourceLocation), shootTexture (Optional<ResourceLocation>), shootTextureMode (enum PER_SHOT/WHILE_FIRING, default PER_SHOT), stats (Map<ResourceLocation, Double>), traits (Map<ResourceLocation, Boolean>), slots (Map<ResourceLocation, Integer>), sounds (Map<String, ResourceLocation>), bulletStyle (Optional<BulletStyle>)
BulletStyle nested record defined with: model (Map<String, ResourceLocation>), renderMode (enum BILLBOARD/3D)
Codec<GunDefinition> defined with correct serialization matching the JSON format in design doc
All optional fields use Codec.optional() with appropriate defaults
stats map uses ResourceLocation keys (attribute IDs) and Double values
traits map uses ResourceLocation keys (trait IDs) and Boolean values, defaults to empty map
slots map uses ResourceLocation keys (plugin type IDs) and Integer values (slot counts), defaults to empty map
